mapper.select: SELECT * FROM im_group WHERE id = #{groupId} AND group_status = 1
SELECT * FROM im_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND member_status = 1 ORDER BY member_role DESC, join_time ASC

SELECT gm.*, g.group_name, g.group_avatar, g.group_owner, g.current_members FROM im_group_member gm LEFT JOIN im_group g ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} AND gm.member_status = 1 AND g.group_status = 1 ORDER BY gm.update_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND member_status = 1
SELECT * FROM im_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
